name: Clinica medical app
description: Full-stack MERN medical clinic application — Express 5 + React 19 monorepo with TypeScript, MongoDB, and shadcn/ui.

scripts.install: npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend
scripts.start: npm run start:backend && npm run start:frontend
scripts.dev: npm run dev:backend && npm run dev:frontend
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend

author: Ali Elmuzayn
